{{Quote|The Empire seems to think that leader of the Death Watch would make a good candidate for a Prime Clone for a new batch of stormtroopers.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[D'krn]]|<ref name="SWG" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] was the '''Overlord''' of the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] remnant during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were based inside the [[Death Watch bunker]] on the [[Moon/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], virtually hidden from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|You'll need to find the Death Watch hideout on Endor. It can be located in the northwestern part of the planet. We need for you to find their leader and bring a sample of his blood back to us.|Commander D'krn, to an Imperial operative|<ref name="SWG" />}}
This Death Watch [[Overlord]] was in command of [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] [[Wraith (Death Watch)|Wraiths]], [[Ghost (Death Watch)|Ghosts]], [[Bloodguard]]s, and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] dispatched within the bunker.<ref name="SWG" />

Sometime in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> he was killed by a group of individuals working for [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[D'krn]], who wished to obtain a vial of his blood for possible usage in [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] a new batch of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
This Death Watch Overlord appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Though his appearance was always obscured by his armor, using an in-game text command revealed him to be a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].<ref name="SWG" />
